calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up Hearing;
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Norma Massagli, Plaintiff appearing on her own behalf.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Jose Mauricio Navarrete and Martha Alicia Navarrete.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Defendant Does dismissed.
Plaintiff is Sworn and examined.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $31,200.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $16,380.00
Costs: $795.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $48,375.00
Judgment signed in open court.
